lines.speaker: Achilka
lines.text: Nilsal, iknami! Are you looking to get along the river?

lines.speaker: Achilka
lines.text: Where would you like to go?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Actually, I don't think I want to go anywhere right now.

lines.speaker: Achilka
lines.text: No worries. You know where to find me when you need me!

lines.speaker: Achilka
lines.text: Currently, my service runs from here to Tal Teklan and then on to the Gloomthorn Trail on the edge of the Auburn Valley. I make the most of the river currents to move rapidly from point to point.

lines.speaker: Achilka
lines.text: The best part is, I make enough money doing deliveries, so if you just want to travel, it's entirely free of charge!

lines.speaker: Achilka
lines.text: Absolutely! Where would you like to go?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I see. I'll keep that in mind.
